name: Trailblazin' Beef Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Chuck Pot Roast, trimmed and cut into 1-inch cubes
2 large Onions, each cut into 8 pieces
4 Ears Corn, each cut into 4 pieces
3 Carrots, peeled and cut into 1-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 3 tablespoons of olive oil in a large skillet. Add meat, garlic powder, and cumin; stir-fry until meat is well browned. Remove with a slotted spoon to an 8-quart stock pot.
2. Heat remaining 3 tablespoons of oil in the pan; add onion and sauté until soft. Transfer to the pot.
3. Add remaining ingredients, bring to a boil. Cover, reduce heat and simmer for 1 hour or longer.
4. Serve with flour tortillas or cornbread.
Per serving: 355 calories, 22 g protein, 37 g carbohydrate, 14 g fat, 3 g saturated fat, 41 mg cholesterol, 335 mg sodium, 4 g fiber.
